/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/nas/sycamore/apps/mvapich/4.0/intel_2024.2.1/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/LibBSE.dir/driver/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LibBSE.dir/src/io/LibBSE_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LibBSE.dir/src/mpi/LibBSE_mpi.cpp.o -o LibBSE  -Wl,-rpath,/nas/sycamore/apps/mvapich/4.0/intel_2024.2.1/lib /nas/sycamore/apps/mvapich/4.0/intel_2024.2.1/lib/libmpicxx.so /nas/sycamore/apps/mvapich/4.0/intel_2024.2.1/lib/libmpi.so
